title: Shkalacar Tire Pressure Monitoring System, Solar Tire Pressure Monitor with Voice Alarm, Real-time Display, for Car SUV Off-Road Vehicle
features: [Voice Alerts] Be informed of critical warnings such as low tire pressure or sensor battery status at all times.
[Real-time Monitoring] Stay safe with instant alerts for low pressure or high temperature while on the road.
[Simultaneously Monitor] Keep track of all four tires at once on a clear display, showing pressure and temperature.
[Intelligent Auto On/off] Activate the display when your car starts and shut down when parked for convenience.
[Dual Charging] Never worry about power with solar and usb capabilities for continuous functionality during any drive.
description: Product Description Specification: Main Material: ABS Host Battery: Built-in 3.7V 300mAh Lithium Battery Waterproo Rating: IPX7 External Sensor Battery: Built-in CR1632 button cell Screen Pressure Unit: PSI/BAR Screen Temperature Unit: ℃/℉ Pressure Range: 0-5 BAR Operating Temperature: -20℃ to 70℃ Charging Voltage: DC 5.1V Transmission Frequency: 433.92 MHz Transmission Power: >10 dBm PackageList: PackageList: 1 * Host 4 * External Sensors 4 * Anti-theft Nuts 1 * Wrench 1 * USB Charging Cable 1 * Bracket
